title: Generate JSON Data for a Travel Agency
constraints: The JSON output should be under 500 bytes
The JSON output should include at least 3 destinations
The JSON output should not contain any duplicate destination IDs

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated JSON data adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the generated JSON data syntactically valid?
Does the generated JSON data contain diverse content, including different destination names, activity descriptions, and itinerary details?
